0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Get Mnemosyne running in under 5 minutes. This guide covers installation, basic configuration, and your first memory operations."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"pip or uv package manager"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"First, activate the Hermes agent virtual environment:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"source ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Then install Mnemosyne ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"with embeddings support"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# If your venv was created with python -m venv or virtualenv\npip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# If your venv was created with uv venv (pip is not included)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"uv venv does not include pip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you created the Hermes venv with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv venv"}],", running ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," will fail with \"command not found.\" This is by design — uv replaces pip with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip"}],". Always use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install"}]," in uv-created environments."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"fastembed is required for semantic memory"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," extra installs ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"fastembed"}],", which powers semantic vector search. Without it, Mnemosyne falls back to primitive FTS5 keyword search only. You will ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," get:"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Semantic similarity search"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Context-aware retrieval"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Meaning-based memory matching"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Hybrid search (vector + text combined)"}],"\n"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Always install with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," unless you are explicitly running a keyword-only deployment."]}]]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Or with uv (recommended for speed):"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Initialize the Database"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the built-in installer to set up the SQLite database and schema:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Note:"}]," Mnemosyne uses SQLite with FTS5 for full-text search by default. With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," installed, semantic vector search is available. An optional ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," package can further optimize vector storage — install it only if you need maximum query performance on large datasets."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La"],["$Lb"],"$Lc"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"5CS-Z2GOu_j-gS8atNSXn"}
5:["$","p",null,{"children":"Confirm everything is working:"}]
6:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats","language":"bash"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":"This should print memory statistics (e.g. total memories, database size). You can also check the version:"}]
